figures.caption: Figure 1. Output image (left) and depth map (right) for different configurations. Configurations from top to bottom: Full data TensoRF, Low data TensoRF, Low data TensoRF-DS Note: Though the bottom two images look similar, they are indeed different depth maps. We discuss a reason for this in Sec. 5

Table 2. Table of various feature decoding architectures tried and their corresponding train and test PSNR values. Note that these PSNR values were generated in 2500 iterations and by downsampling train and test by a factor of 4.
